payload.claim_text: A team in Subways' Division of Station Environment & Operations supported the successful implementation of OMNY and the roll out of the new OMNY Card Vending Machines
payload.subject: Subways Division of Station Environment & Operations

tool_args.label: Bus redesigns supported by Steve Mescall

payload.claim_text: Steve has been instrumental in helping train staff to implement NYCT's major bus redesigns including the first redesign in Staten Island and the largest in the Bronx
payload.subject: Steve Mescall

payload.claim_text: Rich has been responsible for delivering several key training components including the Department of Buses Mentor Program, The Beyond Force De-escalation project, the National Safety Council's Train the Trainer Defensive Driving curriculum. He also brought back T.O.P class project, Vision Zero Task Force and Fleet Group.
payload.subject: Rich Cerezo

payload.claim_text: Business Process Re-Engineering is leading Bus data analysis and reporting for more robust data-driven decision making by Bus management, as demonstrated by recent improvements on several routes recategorized from being included in Buses 29 Underperforming Bus Routes
payload.subject: NYCT Department of Buses Business Process Re-Engineering

payload.claim_text: Daniel has successfully expanded and enhanced Tableau reporting for Buses that gives divisions the ability to quickly analyze key performance indicators. He has also redesigned several major dashboards with more impactful visuals.
payload.subject: Daniel Meade
